allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add Google Calendar sync, Blue Sky filings, multi-unit nav, and Home page

- Google Calendar integration: new calendarService, calendar.readonly scope,
  auto-sync on Dashboard mount with 5-min cache, manual Sync Calendar button
- Blue Sky filing tracker: blueskyStore, BlueskyFilingModal with Gmail evidence
  picker, auto-detect out-of-state investors, deadline tracking in Compliance
- Context-aware back navigation: sub-pages link back to unit root, not Home
- Home page with multi-unit launcher and UnitPlaceholder for future modules
- Fix infinite re-render in Compliance \(Zustand selector returning new array\)
- Add state field to investor positions/seed data for regulatory tracking
- Update internal route paths from /directory to /pe/directory etc.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
